text.title: llamaindex-sql-query Core Rules
text.summary: Rules for NL-to-SQL via LlamaIndex NLSQLTableQueryEngine: connection mode, table retrieval, schema constraints, SQL safety.

rule.statement: Always connect with a read-only DB user. NL-to-SQL must never have permission to DROP, DELETE, UPDATE, or INSERT.
rule.rationale: An LLM-generated DROP TABLE is one prompt away; the DB user is the only enforceable boundary.

rule.statement: For DBs with more than 20 tables, build an ObjectIndex of SQLTableSchema and retrieve top-3 relevant table schemas per query. Never dump the full schema into the prompt.
rule.rationale: Schema dumping on a 200-table DB consumed 8k tokens per query before the answer started.

rule.statement: For DBs with at most 20 tables, use the include_tables allowlist explicitly. Implicit selection over-includes.
rule.rationale: Allowlist forces the engine to surface only the schemas relevant to the workload.

rule.statement: Inject a LIMIT clause into every generated SELECT (default LIMIT 100 unless caller overrides).
rule.rationale: SELECT * with no LIMIT returned 10M rows in one incident, OOMing the worker.

rule.statement: Validate generated SQL columns against the actual table schema before execution; reject if any column does not exist.
rule.rationale: LLMs fabricate columns when uncertain; pre-flight validation catches it before the DB does.

rule.statement: Return both the generated SQL and the answer to the caller. Hide-the-SQL surfaces are not auditable.
rule.rationale: Showing the SQL is the user's only way to verify the model answered the right question.

rule.statement: Set a query timeout (5-15s) at the DB connection level. Unbounded queries from LLM-generated joins can run for hours.
rule.rationale: LLM-generated cross-joins on large tables can run to billions of rows; timeout is the only safe cap.

rule.statement: Forbid the engine from accessing tables containing PII unless pii_posture explicitly allows it.
rule.rationale: NL-to-SQL surfaces data through paraphrase; pseudonymisation in the prompt is not enough.

rule.statement: Stub rule for conclusion 'r-advanced' referenced from 06-decision-tree.xml. Replace with the real testable rule that resolves this branch of the tree.
rule.rationale: Auto-added by fix-methodology-phase-d.py to keep tree refs resolvable.

rule.statement: Stub rule for conclusion 'r-default-high' referenced from 06-decision-tree.xml. Replace with the real testable rule that resolves this branch of the tree.
rule.rationale: Auto-added by fix-methodology-phase-d.py to keep tree refs resolvable.

rule.statement: Stub rule for conclusion 'r-default-low' referenced from 06-decision-tree.xml. Replace with the real testable rule that resolves this branch of the tree.
rule.rationale: Auto-added by fix-methodology-phase-d.py to keep tree refs resolvable.
